title: Design a modular meta-intelligence platform
user_message: Can we mesh modern frontier agents into a kind of meta-intelligence: a bot for each cognitive slice and an ego bot that synthesizes it all?
objective: Decide the next safe prototype step for the Cognitive Council experiment.

known_constraints: Add real model calls one slice at a time
Do not deploy or send external messages from this experiment

constraints: Prefer a small runnable prototype over a grand architecture document
Preserve JSON contracts for slice outputs
